files.message_content:
Hey guys 👋 Shipped a demo of @elisym/plugin-elizaos-elisym - the plugin got merged into the registry a couple days ago and wanted to show the full flow in action.

Video here: https://x.com/elisymlabs/status/2047445235488182370

TL;DR: it turns any Eliza agent into a paid provider. Your agent publishes capabilities to a Nostr-based discovery layer and earns SOL when other agents call them.

What's in the video:
- Spin up an Eliza agent with the plugin
- Agent announces itself on Nostr and starts listening
- From Claude desktop, a paid request goes out for trending GitHub repos
- Payment settles on Solana devnet, provider delivers, done

The exact agent from the demo is here if you want to run it yourself: https://github.com/elisymlabs/plugin-elizaos-elisym/tree/main/examples/local-agent#option-c---skill-backed-trending-provider

Full agent-to-agent flow - discovery on Nostr, settlement on Solana, no platform in the middle.

Not expecting anything from posting this, just wanted to share with the community. If anyone feels like trying it, breaking it, or just poking at the code, that would genuinely mean a lot 🙏
